productDisplayName: Timberland Men Casual Brown Casual Shoes
description: Trendy and comfortable, the timberland Heritage 3-Eye Classic Lug comes in a classic design and is packed with features that makes it much more than just a footwear -  a perfect buy for those men who never compromise on comfort and style. UpperNubuck leather upper for absolute durability, comfort and styleFabric inner lining with a well-padded collar for ultimate breathable comfortLeather lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Brand on lateral side and tongue for styleMidsoleLeather lined cushioned footbed for all-day comfort OutsoleDurable rubber outsole with lugs for ultimate grip and tractionshoe careUse a nubuck brush to clean upperDo not wash or store in direct sunlight
